# OSMFlutterFramework

A Swift package providing an iOS OpenStreetMap view (`OSMView`) backed by MapCore. Designed for embedding in Flutter apps via platform views, and directly usable in SwiftUI/UIKit apps.

## Stack
- Swift 5.9+
- SPM package
- Dependencies: MapCore, Alamofire, Polyline, OSRMTextInstruction, DjinniSupport

## Source Layout
```
Sources/OSMFlutterFramework/
  OSMView.swift            # Main UIView map view, camera, gesture delegates
  SystemFontLoader.swift   # MCFontLoaderInterface implementation for vector tile fonts
  OSMTileConfiguration.swift
  models/
    MarkerManager.swift    # Add/remove/update map markers
    RoadManager.swift      # Draw polylines/roads, tap handling
    ShapeManager.swift     # Draw circles, rectangles, polygons
    PoisManager.swift      # POI layer management
    LocationManager.swift  # User location tracking, CLLocationManager wrapper
    OSMMarker.swift        # Marker and MarkerConfiguration models
    ZoomConfiguration.swift
    BoundingBox.swift
    CustomTiles.swift
    extensions.swift
```

## Installation
Add to `Package.swift`:
```swift
.package(url: "https://github.com/liodali/OSMMapCoreIOSFramework.git", from: "1.0.0")
```

## OSMView (Main Map View)

### Initialization
```swift
public init(
    rect: CGRect,
    location: CLLocationCoordinate2D?,
    zoomConfig: ZoomConfiguration,
    mapTileConfiguration: OSMMapConfiguration = OSMMapConfiguration(),
    tile: CustomTiles? = nil
)
```

### Camera & Navigation
```swift
public func initialisationMapWithInitLocation()
public func moveTo(location: CLLocationCoordinate2D, zoom: Int?, animated: Bool)
public func moveToByBoundingBox(bounds: BoundingBox, animated: Bool)
public func setBoundingBox(bounds: BoundingBox)
public func center() -> CLLocationCoordinate2D
public func getBoundingBox() -> BoundingBox
public func zoom() -> Int
public func setZoom(zoom: Int, animated: Bool = true)
public func zoomIn(step: Int? = nil, animated: Bool = true)
public func zoomOut(step: Int? = nil, animated: Bool = true)
public func enableRotation(enable: Bool)
public func setRotation(angle: Double, animated: Bool = true)
public func stopCamera()
```

### Touch Control
```swift
public func disableTouch()
public func enableTouch()
```

### Tile Configuration
```swift
public func setCustomTile(tile: CustomTiles)
```

- `OSMView` initializes with either a raster or vector base layer depending on `tile?.isVector`.
- Raster tiles use `OSMTiledLayerConfig` with `{x}/{y}/{z}` URL templates.
- Vector tiles use `MCTiled2dMapVectorLayerInterface` with a `styleURL` and a built-in `SystemFontLoader`.

### Layer Visibility
```swift
public func hideAllLayers()
public func showAllLayers()
```

### Managers (Public Properties)
```swift
public let markerManager: MarkerManager
public let roadManager: RoadManager
public let poisManager: PoisManager
public let locationManager: LocationManager
public let shapeManager: ShapeManager
```

### Delegates (Public Properties)
```swift
public var onMapGestureDelegate: OnMapGesture?
public var onMapMove: OnMapMoved?
public var mapHandlerDelegate: MapMarkerHandler?
public var userLocationDelegate: OSMUserLocationHandler?
public var roadTapHandlerDelegate: PoylineHandler?
```

## MarkerManager
```swift
public func addMarker(marker: Marker)
public func updateMarker(
    oldlocation: CLLocationCoordinate2D,
    newlocation: CLLocationCoordinate2D,
    icon: UIImage?,
    iconSize: MarkerIconSize? = nil,
    angle: Float? = nil,
    anchor: MarkerAnchor? = nil,
    scaleType: MarkerScaleType? = nil
)
public func removeMarker(location: CLLocationCoordinate2D)
public func removeMarkers(locations: [CLLocationCoordinate2D])
public func getAllMarkers() -> [CLLocationCoordinate2D]
public func hildeAll()          // hides all markers
public func showAll()           // shows all markers
public func lockHandler()       // toggle marker tap handler on/off
```

## RoadManager
```swift
public func addRoad(id: String, polylines: [CLLocationCoordinate2D], configuration: RoadConfiguration)
public func addRoad(id: String, polylines: String, configuration: RoadConfiguration) // encoded polyline string
public func removeRoad(id: String)
public func removeAllRoads()
public func hildeAll()
public func showAll()
public func lockHandler()
```

## ShapeManager
```swift
public func drawShape(key: String, shape: PShape)
public func deleteShape(ckey: String)
public func deleteAllShapes()
public func deleteAllCircles()
public func deleteAllRect()
public func hideAll()
public func showAll()
```

## PoisManager
```swift
public func setOrCreateIconPoi(id: String, icon: UIImage, iconSize: MarkerIconSize?)
public func setMarkersPoi(id: String, markers: [MarkerIconPoi])
public func clearMarkersPoi(id: String, markers: [MarkerIconPoi])
public func hildeAll()
public func showAll()
public func lockHandler()
```

## LocationManager
```swift
public func setUserLocationIcons(userLocationIcons: UserLocationConfiguration)
public func requestSingleLocation()
public func requestEnableLocation()
public func toggleTracking(configuration: TrackConfiguration)
public func isTrackingEnabled() -> Bool
public func stopLocation()
public func moveToUserLocation(animated: Bool = true)
public func setCLLocationManager(locationDelegate: CLLocationManagerDelegate?)
public func setCLLocationManagerToDefault()
```

## Configuration Types

### ZoomConfiguration
```swift
public struct ZoomConfiguration {
    public let initZoom: Int
    public let minZoom: Int
    public let maxZoom: Int
    public let step: Int
    public init(initZoom: Int = 0, minZoom: Int = 0, maxZoom: Int = 19, step: Int = 1)
    public init(_ map: [String: Int])
}
```

### Marker / MarkerConfiguration
```swift
public struct Marker {
    public init(location: CLLocationCoordinate2D, markerConfiguration: MarkerConfiguration)
}

public typealias MarkerIconSize = (x: Int, y: Int)
public typealias MarkerAnchor = (x: Double, y: Double)

public enum MarkerScaleType {
    case Scale
    case rotate
    case invariant
    case fixed
}

public struct MarkerConfiguration {
    public init(
        icon: UIImage,
        iconSize: MarkerIconSize?,
        angle: Float?,
        anchor: MarkerAnchor?,
        scaleType: MarkerScaleType = .Scale
    )
    public func copyWith(
        icon: UIImage? = nil,
        iconSize: MarkerIconSize? = nil,
        angle: Float? = nil,
        anchor: MarkerAnchor? = nil,
        scaleType: MarkerScaleType? = nil
    ) -> MarkerConfiguration
}
```

### RoadConfiguration
```swift
public enum PolylineType { case LINE; case DOT }
public enum LineCapType { case BUTT; case ROUND; case SQUARE }

public struct RoadConfiguration {
    public init(
        width: Float,
        color: UIColor,
        borderWidth: Float? = nil,
        borderColor: UIColor? = nil,
        opacity: Float = 1.0,
        lineCap: LineCapType = .ROUND,
        polylineType: PolylineType = .LINE
    )
}
```

### ShapeStyleConfiguration
```swift
public struct ShapeStyleConfiguration {
    public init(
        filledColor: UIColor,
        borderColor: UIColor,
        borderWidth: Double,
        lineCap: LineCapType = .ROUND
    )
}
```

### TrackConfiguration
```swift
public struct TrackConfiguration {
    public var moveMap: Bool = false
    public var useDirectionMarker: Bool = false
    public var disableMarkerRotation: Bool = false
    public var controlUserMarker: Bool = true
    public init(
        moveMap: Bool = false,
        useDirectionMarker: Bool = false,
        disableMarkerRotation: Bool = false,
        controlUserMarker: Bool = true
    )
}
```

### UserLocationConfiguration
```swift
public struct UserLocationConfiguration {
    public init(userIcon: MarkerConfiguration, directionIcon: MarkerConfiguration?)
    public func copyWith(
        userIcon: MarkerConfiguration? = nil,
        directionIcon: MarkerConfiguration? = nil
    ) -> UserLocationConfiguration
}
```

### BoundingBox
```swift
public class BoundingBox: Equatable {
    public init(north: Double = 85.0, west: Double = -180.0, east: Double = 180.0, south: Double = -85.0)
    public init(center: CLLocationCoordinate2D, distanceKm: Double)
    public init(boundingBoxs: [Double])
    public func center() -> CLLocationCoordinate2D
    public func isWorld() -> Bool
    public func toLLocations() -> (topLeft: CLLocationCoordinate2D, bottomRight: CLLocationCoordinate2D)
    public func toMap() -> [String: Double]
}
```

### CustomTiles
```swift
public class CustomTiles {
    public private(set) var isVector: Bool
    public init(_ mapTile: [String: Any], isMapCore: Bool = true)
    public func toString() -> String
}
```

- Raster tiles: parses a URL template with `{x}/{y}/{z}` and optional `{s}` subdomains.
- Vector tiles: when `mapTile["isVector"] == true`, reads `styleURL` (or the first entry in `urls`) and returns that style URL from `toString()`.

## Delegate Protocols

```swift
public protocol OnMapGesture {
    func onSingleTap(location: CLLocationCoordinate2D)
    func onLongTap(location: CLLocationCoordinate2D)
}

public protocol OnMapMoved {
    func onMove(center: CLLocationCoordinate2D, bounds: BoundingBox, zoom: Double)
    func onRotate(angle: Double)
    func onMapInteraction()
}

public protocol OSMUserLocationHandler {
    func locationChanged(userLocation: CLLocationCoordinate2D, heading: Double)
    func handlePermission(state: LocationPermission)
}

public protocol PoylineHandler {
    func onTap(roadId: String)
}

public protocol MapMarkerHandler {
    func onMarkerSingleTap(location: CLLocationCoordinate2D)
    func onMarkerLongPress(location: CLLocationCoordinate2D)
}
```

## CLLocationCoordinate2D Extensions
```swift
public func isEqual(rhs: CLLocationCoordinate2D, precision: Double = 1e6) throws -> Bool
public func distance(other: CLLocationCoordinate2D) -> Double
public func destinationPoint(distanceInMeter: Double, bearingInDegree: Double) -> CLLocationCoordinate2D
```

## Rules for Contributors
- Do NOT add UIKit/SwiftUI code inside `Sources/OSMFlutterFramework/` — keep it pure framework code
- UI/overlay changes belong in the example app or the consumer app only
- Avoid `import SwiftUI` in the main package sources
